sourceOwners.name: Rochester Hope for Pets (Vet Bill Assistance)

webVerification.sourceLabel: Rochester Hope for Pets contact page
webVerification.notes: Web confirms (585) 371-8450 as Rochester Hope for Pets line. 2816 Monroe Ave, Rochester NY 14618. M-F 9am-3pm. Vet bill grants for households within 40 miles of Rochester.
